episodes.title: Where is Sally Contarino? Sam Bateman's Crazy Opening
episodes.description:
Please help us find missing Sally Contarino. Thank you to Hidden True Crime for letting us play the testimony of Sam Batement in his trial in AZ today. This guy is an FLDS cult leader and was the focus of the docuseries on Netflix called False Prophet. Now he is charged by the state of AZ for child abuse. Join our Websleuths discussion
https://websleuths.com/threads/az-polygamist-cult-leader-samuel-rappylee-bateman-46-charged-with-child-sex-trafficking-12-4-22-now-faces-state-charges-in-new-trial.648841/page-3
Please be sure and watch The Many Lives of Benjaman Kyle on I.D. You an find it on Hulu, Amazon Prime and anywhere basically where you can find Discovery I.D. Then on Saturday night we will have a special in-depth interview with the makers of this amazing documentary. 
Here are a few links to places you can stream the documentary. 
https://www.hulu.com/series/the-many-lives-of-benjaman-kyle-e9ece687-8619-4707-a9c7-e30f7ffae92d
https://www.discoveryplus.com/shows/many-lives-of-benjaman-kyle/5f4d98e0-d49d-4a20-aa41-d1a63becbde8
https://www.hbomax.com/shows/many-lives-of-benjaman-kyle/5f4d98e0-d49d-4a20-aa41-d1a63becbde8
#samuelbateman #websleuths #benjamankyle #websleuths #hiddentruecrime
